creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #2)
> Also, I am not sure agree with the "and documentation" bit for _MAN,
> man pages are installed with 444 mode.

Why the Porter's Handbook says otherwise then?

  INSTALL_MAN is a command to install manpages and other documentation
  (it does not compress anything).
  ...  
  post-install:
  	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
  	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/docs/xvdocs.ps ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/install.html
